Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 306}I hear that, starting on the 23rd, some athletic teams will be recruiting new members...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 306}...Actually, it's just the track and field team. I guess the others are full.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 306}If you're interested in joining, why don't you go check it out?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 306}From the classroom, go down the stairs to the right and eventually you'll find it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 306}Looks like some of the athletic teams are recruiting new members...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 306}...Actually, it's just the track and field team. I guess the others are full.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 306}If you're interested in joining, why don't you go check it out?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 306}From the classroom, go down the stairs to the right and eventually you'll find it.[n]{f 1 1}
